meta.synopsis: A mysterious stranger named Black Dog arrives at the inn, seeking Billy Bones. Their confrontation turns violent, resulting in Black Dog fleeing and Billy Bones suffering a stroke. Doctor Livesey tends to the captain, warning him that continued drinking will be fatal.
